affixs.detail:
At the end of each turn, foes gain 1 Berserk stack.
Berserk: Increase damage by a set amount. Stacks up to 3 times.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: When a foe is knocked down, increase final damage by 80%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: Party's Electric damage is increased by 20%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: If the party contains Guardians or Medics, all foes' final damage dealt is decreased by 60% and final damage taken is increased by 20%. If not, all foes' final damage dealt is increased by 60%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: When allies deal damage with skills or Resonances, standard critical damage calculations are not carried out (regardless of whether or not a critical hit occurs), but deal increased final damage from skills and Resonances. This increase is equal to critical hit rate x (critical damage - 100%). (Max critical hit rate in this calculation is 100%).
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail:
At the end of each turn, foes gain 1 Berserk stack.
Berserk: Increase damage by a set amount. Stacks up to 3 times.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: Allies' Theurgy damage is increased by 30%. After using a Theurgy, user's damage is increased by 30% more for 3 turns.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: Whenever an ally deals damage, that ally's damage is increased by 4%. Lasts for 3 turns. Stacks up to 10 times.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: If the party contains Guardians or Medics, all foes' final damage dealt is decreased by 60% and final damage taken is increased by 20%. If not, all foes' final damage dealt is increased by 60%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: When allies deal damage with skills or Resonances, standard critical damage calculations are not carried out (regardless of whether or not a critical hit occurs), but deal increased final damage from skills and Resonances. This increase is equal to critical hit rate x (critical damage - 100%). (Max critical hit rate in this calculation is 100%).
affixs.name: Special Effect

mode.detail: Each turn, the boss's attacks grow stronger, and you get more points!
mode.name: Multidimensional Dreamscape
